---
title: "License"
---

## MIT License

This project is licensed under the MIT License. See the full license text at
[LICENSE](https://github.com/microsoft/physical-ai-toolchain/blob/main/LICENSE).

## Documentation License

Documentation text in this book is available under
[Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0)](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).

![Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License](https://licensebuttons.net/l/by/4.0/88x31.png){fig-alt="CC BY 4.0 license badge"}

You are free to share and adapt the material for any purpose, even commercially,
as long as you give appropriate credit, provide a link to the license, and
indicate if changes were made.
